trigger: 30-minute MVP builder run: extend /api/evidence/:id/check-access integration coverage to include mentor, program teacher, and admin allow paths with audit assertions.
scope: Add route-level integration tests for /api/evidence/:id/check-access covering mentor-assigned access, program-teacher program-scope access, and admin access, asserting audited role scopes and storage-id redaction via a deterministic mocked D1.
changes: Extended tests/evidence-check-access.integration.test.mjs with 200-path coverage for mentor-assigned access, program-teacher program-scope access, and admin access for /api/evidence/:id/check-access, including audit metadata assertions for actor role scopes and storage-id redaction.
Updated docs/automation-memory.md to reflect the expanded protected-evidence access route coverage.
known_limits: Evidence access route tests still use a deterministic mocked D1 interface; follow-on work should validate behavior against a real local D1 instance (Wrangler/Miniflare) when available.
Program-teacher coverage in the evidence access route tests currently exercises program scope; consider adding cohort-scope coverage in a follow-on pass.
next_actions: Add cohort-scope program-teacher allow-path coverage for /api/evidence/:id/check-access and extend tests to assert consistent audit metadata for all allow/deny paths.
Advance MVP-013 by implementing Google Drive server-side credential/OAuth for uploads/retrieval and expand protected-evidence tests around storage provider behavior.
